strategy: Expect three -200% Tower Shields on the boss from the start of Round 1, so your first big hit would be almost fully absorbed. Plan to remove them before you commit.
Pack Shatter or Steal Ward, or use cheap wand hits and small spells to pop the shields one at a time.
Attack with Fire (it takes +30% Fire); avoid Ice (56% resist) and note it resists all other schools 26%.
It is stunable and beguilable, so use a stun or beguile to buy a safe setup round while you clear shields.
The shields reapply three Rounds after you destroy them, so knock them off and land your bladed hit in the same window before they reset.
cheatNotes: On Round 1 it stacks three -200% Tower Shields on itself, so your first big hit is mostly absorbed. Break them with Shatter, Steal Ward, or cheap wand hits before committing.
Each shield comes back three Rounds after you destroy it, so strip them and hit in the same window before they reset.
